events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1060. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: tree_nut, shellfish. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes eggplant. Cooking ability: full. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Meatloaf with Roasted Vegetables
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/600 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 451/600 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (120 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1060 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00 (Excelsior group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1060: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
